commands.review_summary:
The PR adds best-effort `thread/unsubscribe` cleanup in the Codex conversation-bound turn finalizer and extends tests for missing-thread recovery when the retry fails.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main’s bound-turn finalizer lacks `thread/unsubscribe`, and the recovery path directly retries after writing a replacement binding. There is no live reproduction in the PR body or linked report.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed for real behavior proof; there is no narrow code defect for ClawSweeper to repair automatically.

target.title: fix(codex): unsubscribe bound threads after turns
target.body:
## Summary

- Fixes #85458.
- Adds best-effort `thread/unsubscribe` cleanup after Codex app-server bound turns finish or fail.
- Covers missing-thread recovery when the replacement thread retry fails, preserving the saved replacement binding while releasing app-server subscriptions.

## Tests

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/conversation-binding.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt-thread-cleanup.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/codex/src/conversation-binding.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-binding.test.ts`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Codex app-server conversation bindings now best-effort unsubscribe the bound thread after every turn attempt, including the missing-thread recovery retry path, so a recreated bound thread is not left subscribed when the retry rejects.
Real environment tested: Local macOS checkout on current `origin/main`; Codex app-server client behavior exercised through the repository's runtime-facing mocked app-server client tests because no live Codex app-server credentials/session were available in this cron environment.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/conversation-binding.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt-thread-cleanup.test.ts`; `git diff --check`; `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/codex/src/conversation-binding.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-binding.test.ts`.
Evidence after fix: `conversation-binding.test.ts` now observes `turn/start`, `thread/unsubscribe`, `thread/start`, retry `turn/start`, and final `thread/unsubscribe`, and asserts the final unsubscribe targets `thread-new` after retry failure while the binding remains on `thread-new`.
Observed result after fix: Both targeted Vitest commands exited 0; `git diff --check` exited 0; oxfmt reported both changed files use the correct format.
What was not tested: No live Codex app-server session was run; this PR validates the dependency contract at the app-server client request boundary with targeted tests.
target.author: leno23
